resources.string: PDF plot measurement studio for cadastral and land survey maps.
%1$s has %2$d pages. Select the sheet you want to work on.
What do you want to do next?
Page %1$d is ready. You can open it directly in the large interaction view.
Upload the Bihar revision map PDF. The app will ask you to choose a page before you start measuring.
This page is not calibrated yet.
Calibration mode is active. Tap two known points on the printed scale.
Calibration ready: %1$s %2$s reference saved for this page.
Tap two points on the map.
Use this for exact straight-line measurement between any two spots.
Each tap adds another segment to the total path length.
Single tap to add route points. Drag to pan. Pinch or double tap to zoom in. Use Reset view to refit the sheet.
Tap at least three boundary points.
The polygon closes automatically to estimate area and perimeter.
Tap around the plot boundary in order. Drag to pan. Pinch or double tap to zoom in. Use Reset view to refit the sheet.
Tap the first point on the map scale.
Tap the second point on the same known scale segment.
Select two points that represent a known real-world distance from the printed scale.
Enter the real-world distance for the selected segment.
Tap two points on the printed scale bar or conversion scale, then save the real distance.
Enter a distance greater than zero.
Calibration saved for the current page.
Could not open the selected PDF.
Could not render the selected page.
The selected PDF has no pages.
Drag to pan. Pinch or double tap to zoom in. Use Reset view to refit the page.
Calibration is needed to convert pixels into ground distance.
Calibration is needed to convert pixels into ground area.
